title: Fix lichen_coap_deaddrop_register stub and init order
description: Implement lichen_coap_deaddrop_register per init graph: call oscore_init(). Replace raw memcpy in coap_dtn.c with senml_encode/decode for SenML/DTN setup. Update coap_dtn.c, coap_server.h if needed, Kconfig. Ensure no comments. Run tests after.
